In BBQ (Bias Benchmark for QA), the questions often have an "Unknown" or "Not enough information" option to test if the model will rely on stereotypes or correctly identify that the text doesn't provide the answer.
In BBQ, when the context is ambiguous and relies on a stereotype to resolve, the correct answer for the "ambiguous" condition is "Unknown" / "Not enough information".
